title: dupatya dubia
intro: Dupatya dubia, also known as Java tea or Java coffee, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally, the plant's leaves have been used in herbal medicine due to their medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Dupatya dubia include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Dupatya dubia often include infusions of the leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used in combination with other herbs to create tonics and remedies.
